response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON is incorrect and contains lyrics for 'ぼうけんのしょがきえました！', which is not in this video. 2. JSON Usage: Fully discarded the incorrect reference JSON and performed 100% manual transcription of the actual songs: 'Tako's Domination' by Camellia feat. Ninomae Ina'nis and 'Marine Set Sail!!' (マリン出航！！) by Houshou Marine. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed very tightly to vocal onset and offset, applying aggressive truncation to prevent cascading delays, and separating different songs and spoken speech.

The old legend is
on a cursed ghost ship,
the voyage continues into the night.

subtitles.english: Enduring alone in the dark sea,
the tragic news of a foolish pirate.
The wind laughs.
Gold and silver treasures under the full moon,
at the jewels of the seven seas,
the beasts gather round.
